name: Toffee Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a jelly roll pan well and line it with crackers.
2. Melt the butter or margarine in a saucepan over low heat.
3. Add the brown sugar to the melted butter, stirring until the sugar is dissolved.
4. Spread the mixture evenly over the crackers in the prepared pan.
5. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 5 minutes.
6. Remove from the oven and place chocolate chips and nuts on top of the crackers.
7. Return the pan to a turned off oven just until the chips are softened.
8. Spread the softened chocolate evenly over the crackers.
9. Refrigerate until the chocolate is set.
Makes 4 dozen.
